actions.name: init
actions.description: Fires after WordPress has finished loading but before any headers are sent

actions.name: wp_loaded
actions.description: Fires once WordPress, all plugins, and the theme are fully loaded and instantiated

actions.name: wp_enqueue_scripts
actions.description: Enqueue scripts and styles on the front end

actions.name: admin_enqueue_scripts
actions.description: Enqueue scripts and styles in the admin area

actions.name: enqueue_block_editor_assets
actions.description: Enqueue scripts and styles for the block editor

actions.name: enqueue_block_assets
actions.description: Enqueue scripts and styles for both front end and editor

actions.name: wp_head
actions.description: Print scripts or data in the head tag on the front end

actions.name: wp_footer
actions.description: Print scripts or data before the closing body tag on the front end

actions.name: admin_head
actions.description: Print scripts or data in the head tag in the admin area

actions.name: admin_footer
actions.description: Print scripts or data before the closing body tag in the admin area

actions.name: wp_ajax_{action}
actions.description: Handle AJAX requests for logged-in users

actions.name: wp_ajax_nopriv_{action}
actions.description: Handle AJAX requests for non-logged-in users

actions.name: save_post
actions.description: Runs whenever a post or page is created or updated

actions.name: delete_post
actions.description: Runs when a post is deleted

actions.name: user_register
actions.description: Runs when a new user account is created

actions.name: wp_login
actions.description: Runs when a user logs in

actions.name: wp_logout
actions.description: Runs when a user logs out

actions.name: template_redirect
actions.description: Fires before determining which template to load

actions.name: pre_get_posts
actions.description: Fires after the query variable object is created, but before the actual query is run

actions.name: plugins_loaded
actions.description: Fires once activated plugins have loaded

actions.name: after_setup_theme
actions.description: Fires after the active theme's functions.php file is loaded

filters.name: body_class
filters.description: Filter the CSS classes for the body tag

filters.name: post_class
filters.description: Filter the CSS classes for the post container element

filters.name: excerpt_length
filters.description: Filter the number of words in an excerpt

filters.name: excerpt_more
filters.description: Filter the string in the "more" link displayed after a trimmed excerpt

filters.name: upload_mimes
filters.description: Filter the list of allowed mime types and file extensions

filters.name: image_size_names_choose
filters.description: Filter the names and labels of the default image sizes

filters.name: wp_get_attachment_image_attributes
filters.description: Filter the attributes of an image attachment

filters.name: render_block
filters.description: Filter the content of a single block

filters.name: render_block_{block_name}
filters.description: Filter the content of a specific block type
